definition:
ἐξ-ωθέω, -ῶ 
 [in LXX chiefly for נָדָה hi. ;] 
  1. to thrust out: Act.7:45. 
   2. to drive out of the sea, drive on shore: Act.27:39 (WH, txt., ἐκσῶσαι).†
 *ἐκ-σώζω, 
 to preserve from danger, bring safe: Act.27:39 (ἐξῶσαι, WH, mg., R, txt., see: ἐξωθέω).†
  ἐξ-ωθέω, -ῶ 
 [in LXX chiefly for נָדָה hi. ;] 
  1. to thrust out: Act.7:45. 
   2. to drive out of the sea, drive on shore: Act.27:39 (WH, txt., ἐκσῶσαι).†
 *ἐκ-σώζω, 
 to preserve from danger, bring safe: Act.27:39 (ἐξῶσαι, WH, mg., R, txt., see: ἐξωθέω).†
 (AS)
